titleStmt.title: SII 16.298: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 298. (A.R. No. 259 of 1916.) ŚRĪMUSHṆAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the first prākāra of the Bhūvarāha-perumāḷ temple.
This is dated Śaka 1603, obviously a mistake for 1503, Vṛisha, Vaiśākha śu. 15, corresponding to 1581 A.D., April 18 (Tuesday). The king is stated to have been ruling at Ghanagiri, i.e. Penugoṇḍa.

It registers the gift of lands in the villages of Araśūru and Kāvanūru for maintaining a feeding house (alaṅkāra-satra) at the nityapushkaraṇi in the Ādivarāhasvāmi temple at Śrīmushṇam by Rāyasam Aṁṇaya of Vishṇuvardhana-gōtra, Āśvalāyanasūtra and Ṛik-s11ākha. The village of Arasūru is said to have been given as an agrahāra to the donor by Veṅkaṭappa-nāyaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī vijayābdudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbbulu 1603 Agunēṭi vriṣasaṁvatsara vaiśākha
śu 15 lu śrīmadrājādhirāja paramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīra veṁkaṭapatidēvamahā rāyalu A
yyavāru ghanagiri nagaramaṁdu ratnasiṁhvāsanārūḍhulai pṛthivisāṁbrājyamu sēyucuṁḍa gānu viṣṇuva
rdhanagōtraṁ Āśvalāyanasūtraṁ rukuśākhādhyāyulaina kallappa puṭṭibhaṭla pautruḍu veṁka ṭaya pu
truḍu rāyasaṁ Aṁṇaya Ādivarāhasvāmi Alaṁkkāra satrānaku yiccina bhūdāna dharmaśāsanamu
veṁkaṭappanāyani Ayyavāru nāku Agrahārānaku kaṭaḍacēśina Araśūru Agrahārāna māku kaligina
kṣētrālalōnu padikṣētrāluṁnu yajamānakāṁḍlu muppeyiṁnni kāvanūri kṣētrālu yeni
midiṁnni Alaṁkāra satrānaku dhārabōśi yistimi ganaka yī kṣētrasvāmyālanu vaccina phala
pratyāyālu mā manuṣyulē teppiṁcci Ādivarāhasvāmi kōvilalō svayaṁpākaṁ sēyiṁcci svāmi
ki naivēdyaṁ sēyiṁcci Ā prasādaṁ teci nityapuṣkaraṇi tīrthāna Alaṁkkārasatraṁ yiṁṭṭōnu brā
hmalaku nityakrityamuṁnu Aṁnadānaṁ śēśēṭaṭlu kaṭaḍaśēśi yī dharmaṁ mī putrapautra pāraṁ paryaṁgā
nu Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyigānu naḍapiṁcagalavāramani yicina bhūdānadharmaśāsanamu rāyasaṁ Aṇṇappayyavrālu .
Digital edition of SII 16.298 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
